theme: intrusion detector tuned against ever-stealthier attacks
title: SOC Sensor Fusion: Budgeting the 1% Alert Allowance
strategies: single fixed sensor at its own strict quantile (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference; only ever catches whichever attack family happens to fingerprint that one sensor)

equal-share global operating point: split the 1% false-positive allowance evenly across every sensor channel and OR-fuse them (the obvious 'maximize average detection' recipe; dilutes the allowance across channels that do not need it and starves the channel guarding the hardest family)

per-family private-budget probe: for each attack family, find its best single sensor and the threshold that family alone would want if it had the whole 1% to itself (reveals which sensor is each family's fingerprint and how much allowance it actually needs)

max-min budget reallocation: starting from the equal-share point, repeatedly move slices of the shared 1% allowance from a channel serving an already-comfortable family to the channel serving the currently worst-off family, verifying the exact fused false-positive rate after every transfer, until no reallocation still respecting the cap can raise the floor further
